source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

city_government.name: Orngerin Holdfast
city_government.detail: Wind Lord of Orlanth Rex, chief lieutenant of Kallyr Starbrow, focused on the military weakness of Sartar.

city_government.name: Jorjera Latish
city_government.detail: Lhankor Mhy sage and skilled bureaucrat who unofficially runs much of the city's administration.

city_government.name: Erryn Mercy
city_government.detail: Respected healer and patient political voice on the City Ring.

issaries_group.name: Joh Mith
issaries_group.detail: Popular merchant-priest and City Ring member focused on price balance and trade.

issaries_group.name: Darvast Hornos
issaries_group.detail: One of the Exchangers, expert at making deals happen.

issaries_group.name: Lyserian Goodspeech
issaries_group.detail: Pro-Lunar negotiator preserved from exile by tribal protection after liberation.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Garangian Bronze-Guts
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Old scholar and author of the Compendium of Persons Eminent in Every Branch of Learning.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Aranastaya
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Strict disciplinarian who cares deeply for apprentices.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Garstal Shavetop
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Expert in dragonewt and dragon lore.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Krisgrin Many-Tongue
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Specialist in geometry, Jrusteli lore, and Mostali lore.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Mata Min
lhankor_mhy_group.role: Chief Priestess of the Jonstown Library
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Oversees magical training and treasure evaluation.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Poroniel Wolf-Netter
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Known for studying captured Telmori and dire wolves.

lhankor_mhy_group.name: Vala the Undying
lhankor_mhy_group.detail: Remains at the high scribe's table until the Jonstown Compendium is complete.

orlanth_group.name: Bardrinor Red Cow
orlanth_group.role: Storm Voice and City Ring representative
orlanth_group.detail: Calm, reasoned, wealthy, and shrewd political representative of the Cinsina Tribe.

orlanth_group.name: Gollanth the Exile
orlanth_group.detail: Exiled participant in Starbrow's Rebellion who returned with the liberating army.

orlanth_group.name: Harshax Elkenvale
orlanth_group.detail: Educated patron who believes Orlanthi must ally with Elder Races against the Lunars.

other_notables.name: Yerinna the Short
other_notables.detail: Powerful guild leader due to control over food supplies.

other_notables.name: Andrin Swenson
other_notables.detail: Aggressive, shrewd Issaries initiate and plotter.

other_notables.name: Sarostip Prince-Killer
other_notables.detail: Famed killer of Temertain the Philosopher and major Humakti leader in Sartar.

other_notables.name: Ernalsulva Entarios' Daughter
other_notables.detail: Beloved negotiator and leader speaking for the Ernalda temple and associated cults.

other_notables.name: Korang Jester
other_notables.detail: Awkward truth-teller and longstanding, mysterious City Ring member.

stats_note.summary: Book 2 gives full stat blocks for major NPCs including characteristics, combat values, Runes, cults, spells, Passions, skills, languages, magic items, and ransom values.
